title: wedelia symmetrica
intro: Wedelia symmetrica, also known as the Mexican daisy or creeping zinnia, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia symmetrica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Wedelia symmetrica include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
